steps.text: Determine which sampling system configuration is appropriate for sampling.
Prepare the VFC Canister Sampling System with Water/Acid-Gas Management impinger conditioning system.
Attach the canister to the sampling train at the critical orifice.
Start the bypass pump and purge the sampling line for at least two minutes.
Open the canister valve, record the start time/start timer, and collect the sample for approximately 60 minutes.
When the run is complete, close the canister valve, record the stop time.
Collect additional measurements including stack CO2, stack moisture, and stack flow.
Complete the chain of custody (COC) form.
Ship canisters to the laboratory for analysis.

preconditions.text: If stack gas moisture is >3% v/v or acid gas levels are a concern, use the VFC Canister Sampling System with Water/Acid Gas Management.
If moisture is confirmed to be ≤3% v/v and acid gases are not suspected, use the Direct VFC Sampling System.
